title: Spiced Naan Bread
description: A classic Indian flatbread infused with aromatic spices. Serve warm with your favorite curries.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, yeast, and salt.
Gradually add the warm water to the dry ingredients and knead for 5 minutes.
Add the ghee or oil, cumin seeds, chili powder, and garam masala to the dough and knead for another 2 minutes.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with a damp cloth, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Preheat a non-stick skillet or tava over medium heat.
Punch down the dough and divide it into 6-8 equal portions.
Roll out each portion into a ball and then flatten it slightly into a disk shape.
Place the naan breads on the preheated skillet and cook for 1-2 minutes on each side, until they are golden brown and puffed up.
Brush the naan breads with melted ghee or oil and serve warm.
